description: Rust OwnerBriefingOutput.evidence[] flows through Node enforceEvidenceContract and surfaces in the frontend evidence_contract. When seeded invoice/promise data exists, evidence is non-empty, safe_to_show=true, and evidence_source_ids are populated in the audit log.

contract_rules.description: Evidence flows from Rust DB queries → OwnerBriefingOutput.evidence[] → Node enforceEvidenceContract → evidence_contract in API response → frontend EvidenceContractPanel
contract_rules.tenant_scoping: user_id = $1 on all invoice, customer, promise queries

evidence_bounds.priority: overdue invoices first, then unpaid, then broken promises
